_comment: Drop-in secrets file for the Python Wippersnapper client (single-board-computer variant, currently private/unreleased). The Python client uses DIFFERENT broker-override field names from the Arduino firmware (whose fields are io_url + io_port at the top level of secrets.json — see ../wippersnapper-arduino/secrets.example.json). The exact names will be confirmed once the Python repo is reachable (see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md §15 open question 10); until then, the keys below are placeholders flagged with TBD and should not be assumed stable.
_broker_override_TBD: Pending confirmation from the Python WS repo. Likely candidates: mqtt_host/mqtt_port, broker_host/broker_port, or io_url/io_port to mirror the Arduino schema. The HIL controller will populate whichever fields the Python client actually parses once known.
_network_comment: On an SBC the controller usually relies on the system network stack; these fields are only honoured if the client is asked to bring its own.
